title: Konkan Diva Fort
tagline: Konkan Diva Fort — heritage city of Maharashtra

overview.short: Konkandiva Fort (transliteration: Konkandiva Qilа̄) is a fort located 70 km from Pune in Maharashtra.
overview.description: Konkandiva Fort (transliteration: Konkandiva Qilа̄) is a fort located 70 km from Pune in Maharashtra. This fort is on the boundary of Raigad and Pune district. The fort was important as a surveillance fort to keep watch on the possible attack on the Raigad fort through Ghol Village side along the Mutha river.

topPlaces.name: Raigad Fort
topPlaces.description: Raigad, located in the Raigad district of Maharashtra, India, is a hill fort situated near the town of Mahad. It is one of the strongest fortresses on the Deccan Plateau and was historically referred to as Rairee or Rairy fort.

topPlaces.name: Baneshwar
topPlaces.description: Baneshwar Temple The word "Baneshwar" is coined with a very literal sense where "Ban" means Forest and Ishwar stands for God. So when the God resides within a forest, the place can be rightly named as Baneshwar.

topPlaces.name: Mangad Fort
topPlaces.description: Mangad Fort is a survey fort which is situated in Borwadi, an area near Mashidwadi in Mangaon, a taluka in Raigad district in the Indian state of Maharashtra. The fort is made sacred by the footsteps of the founder of Hindavi Swaraj, the famous Maratha king Chhatrapati Shivaji Maharaja.

items.note: Raigad, located in the Raigad district of Maharashtra, India, is a hill fort situated near the town of Mahad. It is one of the strongest fortresses on the Deccan Plateau and was historically referred to as Rairee or Rairy fort.

Baneshwar Temple The word "Baneshwar" is coined with a very literal sense where "Ban" means Forest and Ishwar stands for God. So when the God resides within a forest, the place can be rightly named as Baneshwar.

Mangad Fort is a survey fort which is situated in Borwadi, an area near Mashidwadi in Mangaon, a taluka in Raigad district in the Indian state of Maharashtra. The fort is made sacred by the footsteps of the founder of Hindavi Swaraj, the famous Maratha king Chhatrapati Shivaji Maharaja.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Konkan Diva Fort?
faq.a: The best time to visit Konkan Diva Fort is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Konkan Diva Fort?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Pune Airport (61 km) and the nearest railway station is Pune Junction (54 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Konkan Diva Fort?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Konkan Diva Fort at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Konkan Diva Fort?
faq.a: Stays in Konkan Diva Fort start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Konkan Diva Fort?
faq.a: The top attractions are Raigad Fort, Baneshwar, Mangad Fort.
